response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the first verse and chorus of '初恋大戦争'. Reference JSON provided only chorus fragments; I am transcribing the verses directly from audio/visual cues. The talk segment is transcribed with focus on the new song details. The second song '大人なフリして。' begins at 04:25, and I am transcribing the lyrics without a reference JSON. Timing is strictly aligned to vocal activation.

subtitles.english: This is what you want, right?

subtitles.english: Because it's my first love

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、ちょこたち3人の新曲でした！
subtitles.english: Yes! And that was the new song from the three of us!

subtitles.original: イエーイ！新曲でした！
subtitles.english: Yay! It was a new song!

subtitles.original: 改めまして、ノエル様、ラミィ様と一緒にですね
subtitles.english: Once again, along with Noel-sama and Lamy-sama,

subtitles.original: コラボ歌唱した「初恋大戦争」という新曲なんですけど
subtitles.english: we performed our new collaboration song, 'Hatsukoi Daisensou'.

subtitles.original: 今回、作詞作曲を、めだんし様、
subtitles.english: This time, the lyrics and music were by Medansy,

subtitles.original: そして編曲を、後藤様にお願いいたしました！
subtitles.english: and the arrangement was by Yoshike!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございまーす！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 今回のテーマが、バレンタインの日に3人の可愛い女の子たちが
subtitles.english: The theme this time is three cute girls on Valentine's Day,

subtitles.original: 一人の男の子を手に入れるためにバチバチにね、出し抜き合うみたいな...
subtitles.english: sparring and trying to outwit each other to get one boy...

subtitles.original: 激甘なテーマ楽曲となっております！
subtitles.english: It's an incredibly sweet theme song!

subtitles.original: いいね！可愛い！
subtitles.english: Nice! So cute!

subtitles.original: いやもう3人の声が合わさって、めちゃめちゃアイドルソングになっているので、
subtitles.english: With our three voices combined, it's truly an idol song,

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ皆様聴いてください！
subtitles.english: so please, everyone, have a listen!

subtitles.original: 聴いてねー！
subtitles.english: Give it a listen!

subtitles.original: こちらの楽曲は、この後24時から、2月15日0時からで
subtitles.english: This song will be available from 24:00 today, February 15th, at midnight,

subtitles.original: 各種音楽サイトにて配信されます！
subtitles.english: on various music streaming sites!

subtitles.original: やったー！聴ける！
subtitles.english: Yay! We can listen to it!

subtitles.original: そしてね、この配信後すぐに、この楽曲のMVが公開されます！
subtitles.english: And right after this broadcast, the MV for this song will be released!

subtitles.original: やったー！イエーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay! Woo-hoo!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Thank you! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: 大人なフリして。
subtitles.english: Pretending to be an adult.

subtitles.original: 急に会いたいって
subtitles.english: Suddenly you say you want to meet

subtitles.original: いつものように準備してる
subtitles.english: and I prepare as I always do

subtitles.original: 午前0時過ぎの終電で向かうって返した
subtitles.english: I replied that I'd take the last train after midnight

subtitles.original: やめておきなよって言われても
subtitles.english: Even if I'm told to stop
